name: applyProofTactic
description: Select a proof tactic to apply to the proof tree. Specify the node ID and predicate to apply to. The proof tactic must be suitable to apply for the selected predicate.

proof_tactic.description:
For each of the following definitions Rewrite X to Y, choose the enum if the predicate contains X. cardinalityDefinition: Rewrites `card(S) = k` to `\exists f \cdot f \in (1..k >->> S)`. conjunctionToImplicationRewrite: Rewrite `P \lor Q` to `
eg P \implies Q`. doubleImplication: Rewrite `P \implies (Q \implies R)` to `(P \land Q) \implies R`. equalCardinality: Rewrite `card(S) = card(T)` to `\exists f \cdot f \in (S >->> T)`. equivalence: Rewrite `P \leftrightarrow Q` to `(P \implies Q) \land (Q \implies P)`. finiteDefinition: Rewrite `finite(S)` to `\exists n \in NAT \cdot (\exists f \in (1..n \leftrightarrow S))`. functionalImageDefinition: Rewrite `f(x) = y` to `(x \mapto y) \in f`. implicationAnd: Rewrite `P \implies (Q \land R)` to `(P \implies Q) \land (P \implies R)`. implicationOr: Rewrite `P \implies (Q \lor R)` to `(P \implies Q) \lor (P \implies R)`. inclusionSetMinus: Rewrite `A \subseteq (B \setminus C)` to `(A \subseteq B) \land (A \union C = {})`. removeInclusion: Rewrite `A \subseteq B` to ` orall x \cdot (x \in A \implies x \in B)`. removeMembership: Rewrite `x \in S` based on the definition of S. removeNegation: Rewrite predicate to remove negation. setEqual: Rewrite `A = B` to `(A \subseteq B) \land (B \subseteq A)`. setMinus: Rewrite `x \in (A \setminus B)` to `(x \in A) \land (x 
otin B)`. strictInclusion: Rewrite `A \subset B` to `(A \subseteq B) \land (A 
eq B)`.

node_id.description: ID of the node in the proof tree to apply this function on.
